text:
TARDIS Setup: Part three
Now that your TARDIS has a source of power, if you wish to fly, you must first make one last subsystem. The Dematerialization Circuit. Once you have created and installed your Dematerialization Circuit, you must configure your console so that you have the following controls:
One Vortex Anchor Control
One Handbreak
One Dematerialization Lever
One Power Switch
One Coordinate Lock
These controls are the bare minimum to initiate a sucessful flight + landing, however, are not sufficient for proper navigation nor proper maintenance and will not cover all flight scenarios nor possible optimizations in the flight procedure.
